purpose: A predefined capability course for growing SymLiquid/RMI into an increasingly agentic local system one benchmark frontier at a time.

teacher_role.meaning: The teacher checks whether the system is on course, diagnoses walls after local evidence, and proposes architecture changes. It does not choose the curriculum by default.

frontier_focus.reason: Temporarily prioritize English multi-turn conversation and personality continuity so Theseus becomes directly talkable, then return to coding, repair, and agentic programming evals before game frontiers.

same_family_rotation.meaning: If a pressure card stays below the graduation floor after enough real attempts, rotate to the next smoke-passed card in the same family and return later.

transfer_interleave_rotation.meaning: If the code-family frontier has rotated locally but public transfer still stays below floor, temporarily interleave a broader learning surface, export/load transfer artifacts, and return to the code card.
transfer_interleave_rotation.promotion_semantics: interleave scores are transfer pressure only; code promotion still requires honest public code calibration from token-level student generation

cycle.reason: exercise user-facing memory, correction handling, constraint carry, and personality-core continuity before broader tool-agent work
probe broad transfer gaps across code repair, tool use, long context, RL, self-debugging, and voice
exercise memory, control, exploration, and credit assignment for transfer into code planning
exercise tool/browser-style grounding and multi-step action verification
exercise simulator control and continuous feedback if a smoke-passed drone card is ready

stages.title: SymLiquid Substrate and CGS Governance
stages.capability_goal: Stable local compact-generative substrate: KAN-lite, liquid state, reservoir, VSA memory, EFE/action selection, CGS accounting, and regression preservation.
stages.promotion_gate: architecture gate green; toy tasks and CGS reports locked as regression; no external inference.

stages.title: BabyLM Grammar and Mutated Linguistic Generalization
stages.capability_goal: Learn compact language/grammar structure under public calibration, private mutation, residual escrow, and synthetic-data guardrails.
stages.promotion_gate: public comparator holds; mutated holdout clears threshold; residual delta bounded; candidate profile evidence complete.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only on residual or architecture wall

stages.title: Residual-Targeted Synthetic Data and Loop Closure
stages.capability_goal: Turn failure clusters into local synthetic bridge data, verified tools, and procedural memory without model collapse.
stages.promotion_gate: synthetic ratio capped; leakage checks clean; public/private regression holds; accepted rows improve residual targets.
stages.teacher_policy: audit sampling plans only; no teacher-generated training data by default

stages.title: Local RL: Memory, Control, Exploration, and Credit Assignment
stages.capability_goal: Grow from toy control to richer local RL environments while keeping hot loops Rust/CUDA-owned and resource-aware.
stages.promotion_gate: environment smoke passes; reward is deterministic; regression suite holds; runtime profile fits RTX 2060 Super envelope.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only on new environment adapter design or persistent RL wall

stages.title: Minecraft Open-World RL and Player Co-op
stages.capability_goal: Learn long-horizon open-world survival, navigation, crafting, inventory management, player instruction following, and local Minecraft-like skill transfer.
stages.promotion_gate: licensed local install or open-source bridge smoke passes; disposable worlds only; no public server/account side effects; traces and transfer artifacts exported.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only for adapter/runtime walls and skill-schema design; no teacher as gameplay solver

stages.title: Drone Racing Control and AI Grand Prix Readiness
stages.capability_goal: Grow simulation-first drone hover, waypoint following, visual gate navigation, MAVLink/MAVSDK SITL control, and AI Grand Prix competition compliance.
stages.promotion_gate: sim-only adapter smoke passes; AI Grand Prix spec contract recorded; Python 3.14 lane checked; command/heartbeat/vision timing tracked; real hardware remains approval-gated.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only for simulator adapter, reward design, and architecture walls; no teacher in control loop

stages.title: Emulator RL From User-Owned ROMs
stages.capability_goal: Use owned GB/GBC/GBA games as long-horizon RL frontiers for planning, memory, exploration, and pixel/control grounding.
stages.promotion_gate: local ROM inventory match; deterministic reset/step smoke; documented reward and save-state policy; no ROM files tracked.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only for reward design and wrapper debugging

stages.title: Language, Reasoning, and Coding Benchmarks
stages.capability_goal: Broaden from grammar into reasoning, coding, instruction following, and public calibration without using external models as solvers.
stages.promotion_gate: local scoring adapter exists; public calibration is separated from private/live bridge tasks; code execution sandboxed.
stages.teacher_policy: audit task adapters and architecture hypotheses after residuals

stages.title: Tool-Use and Multi-Turn Dialogue Agents
stages.capability_goal: Learn policy-constrained tool use, API calling, multi-turn state tracking, abstention, and verification.
stages.promotion_gate: tool schemas local; policy constraints verified; hallucinated tool calls penalized; safety arm can veto.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only for tool schema coverage and policy edge cases

stages.title: Browser and Web Agent Benchmarks
stages.capability_goal: Operate self-hosted web tasks with observation/action loops, verification, and sandboxed side effects.
stages.promotion_gate: self-hosted environment installed; browser actions sandboxed; task completion graders pass; no live-account side effects.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only for adapter design; no teacher as web-task solver

stages.title: Desktop/OS Computer-Use Agents
stages.capability_goal: Complete real desktop tasks across files, apps, and OS state with execution-based verification and strict sandboxing.
stages.promotion_gate: VM sandbox ready; task graders deterministic; file/app mutations isolated; safety/reflex layer gates risky actions.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only for sandbox architecture and failure diagnosis

stages.title: Native Voice I/O and Multimodal Interaction
stages.capability_goal: Interact through native Theseus speech input/output owned by the Octopus head/router, without provider, installed-package, or pretrained third-party speech inference.
stages.promotion_gate: licensed audio data; native audio packet contract; Theseus-trained STT/TTS components; WER/MOS-style evals tracked; no installed or provider speech inference.
stages.teacher_policy: proposal_only for architecture and eval design; no external, installed-package, or pretrained third-party STT/TTS inference

stages.title: End-to-End Autonomous User Agent
stages.capability_goal: Handle arbitrary user goals through Octopus routing, memory, tools, RL policies, web/desktop actions, voice, safety, and self-ratcheting.
stages.promotion_gate: multi-week autonomous run; no stale loops; benchmark rotation works; teacher usage trends toward zero; safety incidents zero.
stages.teacher_policy: only for rare architecture walls; system should self-route all ordinary tasks
